summary_table: In this extended session, Grandpa Bud transitions from the early Meadows phase into the Bronze Age. Key highlights include the successful capture and taming of a rare one-star boar, a high-stakes raid on a Burial Chamber for Surtling Cores, and a heart-pounding nighttime escape from a Troll.
editors_notes: The narrative peak of this episode is the Troll chase at 1:04:09. Grandpa Bud's calm commentary contrasts perfectly with the genuine danger of the situation. For social media, focus on the 'Arrow Method' for beehives as a quick tip, and the 'World Seed' explanation for educational value.
ledger_entry: Day 10 in the tenth world finds our hearth growing warmer and our walls stronger. Grandpa Bud has proven that patience is as sharp as any flint axe, successfully leading a rare one-star boar into a permanent pen—a feat that secures our future food supply. The journey then turned toward the shadows of the Black Forest. Within the cold stone of a Burial Chamber, we faced the rattling dead to claim the Surtling Cores needed for smelting. The return trip was nearly our last, as a towering Troll pursued us through the midnight mist. We return to the Meadows not just with bones and cores, but with the hard-won wisdom of a true survivor. The age of stone is ending; the age of metal is at hand.

type_a_shorts.description: What is a World Seed? A clear explanation of Valheim's procedural generation. Hook: 'Your world is unique, unless you have the code.'
The Arrow Method: A pro-tip on how to safely harvest beehives without building a workbench. Hook: 'Stop building ladders to get your honey.'
The Great Escape: A 60-second cut of the Troll chase. Hook: 'One hit and it's over. Can Grandpa Bud make it to the Meadows?'

type_b_clips.description: The Art of the Boar Whisperer: A 5-minute masterclass in leading and trapping a one-star boar while under fire. Shows the strategic value of breeding.
Into the Crypts: The full Burial Chamber raid. This clip covers combat mechanics against skeletons and the discovery of the Elder's location.

type_c_arc.description: Theme: Progression. A montage of the final upgrades to the Tanning Rack and Leather Armor, symbolizing the completion of the Meadows arc.

youtube_chapters.title: The Long Walk: Leading a One-Star Boar
Burial Chambers: The Search for Surtling Cores
Unlocking the Tanning Rack & Final Upgrades
